name: Moth Man
description:
This is my second bot, so don’t expect the greatest of quality.

In this scenario you’ve moved to a cabin located in the outskirts of a small town seeking privacy and solitude. But you find out your cabin is infested with moths and they are eating your clothing.

(This bot is Limitless, I do not own the image, Creation date Monday, November 24 2025.)

have a nice day/night :]

Credits for the image: Julian Callos
